name: emberline
description: Local inline code completion backed by a llama.cpp FIM model.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Completions send file contents to the configured endpoint, and a malicious workspace could repoint that endpoint.

virtualWorkspaces.description: Cross-file context is read from disk by the server, so it is unavailable in virtual workspaces.

emberline.enabled.description: Enable inline completions. Can be overridden per language.

emberline.debounceMs.markdownDescription: Delay before requesting a completion. VS Code already applies its own ~50ms debounce before calling the provider, so the effective delay is this plus 50ms.

emberline.timeoutMs.description: Hard timeout for a completion request.

emberline.disabledLanguages.description: Language ids for which completions are never requested.

emberline.maxPrefixChars.description: Characters before the cursor to send. The server truncates further.

emberline.maxSuffixChars.description: Characters after the cursor to send.

emberline.maxLineSuffixChars.markdownDescription: Skip automatic completion when more than this many non-whitespace characters follow the cursor on the same line. Mid-line suggestions are rarely useful; llama.vim uses 8.

emberline.sendOpenFiles.description: Send paths of other open files so the server can build cross-file context. Paths only; the server reads the contents itself.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
